documentTypes.label: Engineering Spec
documentTypes.purpose: Design specifications that describe how a system or feature should work.

documentTypes.label: Engineering Plan
documentTypes.purpose: Execution plans that describe how engineering work will be delivered.

documentTypes.label: Product Requirement
documentTypes.purpose: Product requirements, user needs, flows, and success metrics.

documentTypes.label: Decision Record
documentTypes.purpose: Decisions that need context, tradeoffs, and follow-up actions.

documentTypes.label: Research Note
documentTypes.purpose: Research notes that separate question, evidence, interpretation, and recommendations.
